info.title: egras API
info.description: Enterprise-ready Rust application seed — tenants, security & audit

403.description: Permission denied or requires user credentials
Not a member of target org

200.description: Paginated list of the caller's organisations

scopes.description:
`null` = inherit all of the service account's permissions.
Empty array is rejected.

plaintext.description:
Plaintext token. Returned exactly once at creation time; the server keeps
only the argon2 hash. Show it to the operator immediately.

ErrorBody.description:
RFC 7807 problem body returned on all error responses.

All six stable fields are present in every response; `errors` is included
only on validation errors (HTTP 400) and maps field name → list of slugs.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence.

errors.description: Field-level validation errors (present only on 400 responses).

instance.description: URI reference identifying the specific occurrence of the problem.

title.description: Short human-readable summary of the error.

type.description: A URI reference identifying the error type.

EvaluatedFeature.description: Effective value for an (org, slug) pair, with provenance for UI/audit.

scopes.description:
`null` = keep existing scopes; `Some(Some(scopes))` = override; `Some(None)` is
not representable in JSON, so the wire-level meaning of an absent field is
"inherit existing".
